title: prunus virginiana var. virginiana
intro: Prunus virginiana var. virginiana, also known as chokeberry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to eastern North America. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The berries of chokeberry have been shown to have numerous health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-diabetic properties, as well as the potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. Chokeberry is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is also used as a food ingredient in jams, jellies, and supplements.
